phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Goya paintings are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿en qué sala está Goya?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, en keh SAH-lah es-TAH GOH-yah?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Queen Sofía Museum is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde está el Museo Reina Sofía?
phrases.pronunciation: dee-SKOOL-peh DÓN-deh EHSTÁ EHL moo-SEH-oh reh-EE-nah soh-FÍ-ah

responses.english: Cross the Paseo del Prado, facing Atocha station.
responses.phonetic: KROO-theh EHL pah-SEH-oh DEHL PRAH-doh FREHN-teh AH ah-TOHTH-ah
responses.local: Cruce el Paseo del Prado, frente a Atocha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Velázquez paintings are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde están las pinturas de Velázquez?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAHN las peen-TOO-rahs deh veh-LAH-keth?

responses.english: Room 12, main floor, at the back.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Velázquez room is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la sala de Velázquez?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh es-TAH lah SAH-lah deh beh-LAHS-kehth

responses.english: First floor, room twelve, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: PLAN-tah pree-MEH-rah, SAH-lah DOH-seh, SEE-gah lah seh-nyah-lee-thah-SYON.
responses.local: Planta primera, sala doce, siga la señalización.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if audio guides are available in English

responses.english: Yes, at the ticket desk by the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: see, ehn lah tah-KEE-yah HOON-toh ah lah ehn-TRAH-dah preen-SEE-pal.
responses.local: Sí, en la taquilla junto a la entrada principal.
